docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARROVILLAS, VANESSA A. AS TO DEFENDANT MCGATHON, KIYANA A. AFOA, CHRISTINA J. SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARROVILLAS, VANESSA A. SERVED MAR-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCGATHON, KIYANA A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARROVILLAS, VANESSA A. SERVED MAR-29-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AFOA, CHRISTINA J.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MEDICAL REIMBURSEMENT LIEN FILED BY CLAIMANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-28-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
